iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 — STABLE. Trump's 'very hard' rhetoric active but contradictory to 'war over soon' messaging. No nuclear-specific escalations. Pezeshkian peace terms still on table but no diplomatic follow-through. Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded/disfigured. Stable at 9.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 — NAVAL DEGRADATION. NEW: CENTCOM confirms 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed including 30+ mine-layers — significant blow to Iran's mining capability. Hegseth vows US will stop Hormuz blockade but no specifics. Oil ~$101/barrel (below $120 threshold). Israel strikes Tehran; Iran retaliates across Gulf. Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel. 6 KC-135 crew dead confirmed. First European soldier killed (France, Irbil). Hormuz: 1,000+ ships blocked. Trend: falling as naval degradation undermines Iran's blockade capacity. Down from 65→60.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATING. Israel strikes central Beirut + most powerful bombardment of Dahiyeh yet. 25-mile evacuation order for south Lebanon. WaPo: war expands into Lebanon. 800K displaced, 680+ killed. Katz: 'no time limit.' Fresh Hezbollah+Iran missile barrage at Israel. IDF preparing expanded operations. Rising.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan friction. Pakistan-Afghanistan war is a separate conflict (see new tracker). Stable.

russia.notes: FDD report: Russia helping Iran with drone tactics informed by Ukraine experience. Trump eased Russian oil sanctions (30-day waiver). Russia continues arms supply to Iran while calling for ceasefire. Stable.

china.notes: Flights around Taiwan resumed March 13. Trump-Xi summit planned Mar 31-Apr 2. China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan. Notably silent on Iran war. Stable.

north_korea.notes: Cruise missile tests from destroyer Choe Hyon continue. DPRK condemned US ME attacks. SCMP: Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: ISW: continued Russian offensive. 860 Russian casualties in 24h. Russia scorched-earth attacks on Ukrainian energy grid near collapse (NYT). Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant. Russia earned ~€6bn in 2 weeks from energy crisis. Russia helping Iran with drone tactics (FDD). Stable elevated.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: NEW TRACKER — Auto-detected. Pakistan-Afghanistan war entering 3rd week. Pakistan calls it 'open war.' Overnight strikes in Kabul, Kandahar, Paktia, Paktika — 6+ civilians killed, Taliban accuses Pakistan of targeting homes. Fuel depots at Kandahar airport struck. Border fighting at Spin Boldak/Mohmand. China's envoy mediating. Pakistan state TV calls strikes 'successful.' Rising.

Hegseth vows US will stop Iran from choking Strait of Hormuz — no specifics (NYT)
1,000+ cargo ships still blocked from Strait of Hormuz transit
Oil at ~$101/barrel — biggest supply disruption in history (IEA)
Israel strikes Tehran; Iran retaliates across Gulf
Fresh Iran+Hezbollah missile barrage on Israel — 2 injured
Pakistan-Afghanistan war 'open war' — 6+ civilians killed in overnight strikes
First European soldier killed — French warrant officer by drone in Irbil

hegseth_hormuz: Hegseth vows US will stop Hormuz blockade but no specifics (iran_conventional)

removed: iran_sunk_ship: Removed — CENTCOM vessel destruction count updated, no confirmed US ship sunk by Iran
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: PARTIAL DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS: Iran's naval mining capability being degrading fast (30+ mine-layers destroyed). Hegseth signaling US will intervene in Hormuz. But: Israel says 'no time limit,' fresh missile barrages continue, oil crisis deepening. Pakistan-Afghanistan adds 3rd active war zone. Two-sided pressure: Iran weakening at sea but fighting hard on land. Key watch: Whether US naval intervention at Hormuz triggers direct US-Iran naval clash, whether Pakistan-Afghanistan spills into broader South Asia instability, and whether Israeli 'no limit' posture keeps region on escalation track.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Tehran as Iran retaliates across Gulf — Day 14
latest_news.text: Day 14 of war. Israel launched new strikes on Tehran; Iran retaliated across the Gulf. Fresh exchange of missile barrages. Hormuz disruption continues to push oil higher.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: US military will stop Iran from choking Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the U.S. military would stop Iran from blocking the Strait of Hormuz but did not specify how. Trump administration working to ease energy crisis.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys 90+ Iranian vessels including 30+ mine-layers
latest_news.text: More than 90 Iranian vessels damaged or destroyed, including over 30 mine-laying ships. Significant degradation of Iran's mining and naval blockade capability.

latest_news.headline: Oil above $100/barrel as Hormuz crisis deepens — IEA calls it historic disruption
latest_news.text: Brent crude at $101.13. IEA: 'biggest oil supply disruption in history.' Asian stock markets sharply lower. Dozens of countries releasing emergency reserves.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes heart of Beirut, orders 25-mile evacuation of south Lebanon
latest_news.text: Most powerful Israeli bombardment of Dahiyeh yet. 800K displaced, 680+ killed. Katz: operation has 'no time limit.' War expands deeper into Lebanon per WaPo.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan calls Afghanistan conflict 'open war' — overnight strikes kill 6+ civilians
latest_news.text: Pakistan military struck Kabul, Kandahar, Paktia, Paktika overnight. Taliban: 6+ civilians killed, homes targeted. Fuel depots at Kandahar airport hit. Third week of fighting. China's envoy mediating.

latest_news.headline: Russia loses 860 troops in 24 hours; scorched-earth on Ukraine energy grid
latest_news.text: Russian losses approach 1.28M total. Scorched-earth attacks putting Ukraine power grid near collapse. Russia helping Iran with drone tactics (FDD). Russia earned ~€6bn from energy crisis in 2 weeks.

latest_news.headline: 1 French soldier killed, 6 wounded by drone in Irbil — first European fatality
latest_news.text: Warrant Officer Arnaud Frion killed in drone attack on Kurdish base in Irbil. Macron: attack 'unacceptable.' First European military fatality of the war.

outlook: CRITICAL — PARTIAL NAVAL DE-ESCALATION: Day 14 brings mixed signals. Iran's mining capability degraded fast (30+ mine-layers destroyed) — Hormuz blockade weakening. Hegseth vows US intervention but no details. However: Israel says 'no time limit,' fresh missile barrages continue, oil crisis deepening ($101/barrel). Pakistan-Afghanistan now 3rd active war zone — 'open war' with civilian casualties. Russia-Ukraine grinds on with massive daily losses. Key watch: Whether US naval intervention at Hormuz triggers direct US-Iran clash, whether Iranian mining capability collapse forces Hormuz reopening, whether Pakistan-Afghanistan destabilizes South Asia further, and whether Trump's contradictory signals ('very hard' vs 'war over soon') resolve into actual policy.
